info.title: Spica Backend Engine API
info.description: Complete OpenAPI 3.1 specification for the Spica open-source backend development engine.

tags.name: User
tags.description: User CRUD, factor auth, passwordless login

get.summary: Get a bucket schema by ID

patch.summary: Partially update a bucket schema (category, order)

delete.summary: Delete a bucket schema and its data

get.summary: List bucket documents with filtering and pagination

post.summary: Insert a new document into a bucket

get.summary: Get available enqueuers, runtimes, and timeout info

delete.summary: Remove a dependency from a function

put.summary: Inject an environment variable into a function

delete.summary: Eject an environment variable from a function

put.summary: Inject a secret into a function

delete.summary: Eject a secret from a function

get.summary: List function execution logs with filters

delete.summary: Clear logs for a specific function

200.description: Paginated env vars or plain array

get.summary: Get an environment variable by ID

IdentityAuth.description: Pass a JWT token prefixed with IDENTITY in the Authorization header: Authorization: IDENTITY <token>

ApiKeyAuth.description: Pass an API key prefixed with APIKEY in the Authorization header: Authorization: APIKEY <key>

Limit.name: limit
Limit.description: Maximum number of items to return

Sort.name: sort
Sort.description: Sort fields. Keys are field names, values are 1 (asc) or -1 (desc)

Paginate.name: paginate
Paginate.description: When true, return paginated {meta, data} response
